title: Fun & More Advancement
description: Come discover over fifty fun and other advancements, easy, funny or challenging! For single-player and multiplayer worlds! - NOW 26.1.1 SUPPORT
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/040df933a8c2163a7f3db653147baa93456df268_0.webp)
**Do you find Minecraft advancements hard and boring ? Try my datapack "Fun & More advancements", it adds around 50 new ones !**

## Advancements
**Advancements are divided into several categories :**
- "Go to Adventure!" – Explore the world
- "Blocks & Cubes" – Collect blocks
- "Monster & Hunter" – Go hunting or tame animals
- "It’s Time to Craft !" – Mine and craft your way through
- "It Cooks…" – Take your time at the furnace
- "A Little Hungry ?" – Eating is essential for life… and for completing these advancements
- "Secret ?" – A set of secret and extremely difficult advancements…

**There's some examples :**
- "Zombie Appocalyspe" - The zombies are attacking, Defend our world!
- "Mystic Tooht" - Sacred dentures ; Eating an enchanted golden apple
- "M. DoorMan" - Proceed to travel through all the doors

→ **I recommand the mod "advancements reloaded" for a better view of the advancement tree…** available [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancements-reloaded).
## Photo 
![Advancement tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/151c1e40b029c56984fda3d919e5a4ac1ee297b4.png)
---
## To coming
- Challenge
- SpeedRun versions
- External link (wiki & report bug)
- More advancement !
---
### Notes
Fun & More Advancement is available in multiplayer, singleplayer, and hardcore mode (no death advancements).
This datapack is inspired by Blaze and Cave, you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack)!

_The datapack will be available in other versions one day…_
